method_atom: an array of N periodically coupled resonant modes in which interference between the coupled resonant pathways suppresses absorption/loss over multiple narrow spectral windows, producing several sharp, highly transmissive transparency bands in the system's frequency response; the coupled-resonator interference reproduces the same multi-band transparency structure as a driven multi-level resonant system.
object_atom: N periodically coupled whispering-gallery-mode optical resonators (realizable as microrings or microdisks) arranged in a parallel all-optical drop-filter configuration.
brief_reason: The transferable part is the coupled-resonant-mode interference producing multiple narrow transparency windows; the domain-specific object is the parallel array of whispering-gallery-mode optical microresonators.
